$description: Page archetypes mapped to an ordered sequence of recipes. The planner selects a blueprint per page and drops sections whose required content the brief does not supply. Blueprints encode composition taste; they never invent recipes.

minimal.description: Single-message page: hero and a call to action.

rules: A page always opens with header and closes with footer.
Exactly one hero per page; it owns the page h1.
A section is dropped (not improvised) when the brief lacks its required content.
Section order is preserved as given — it is the reading and tab order.
